commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Revenged. Hebrew, "I have broken them "(Calmet) or "will render to them. "(Houbigant)
This may relate to David, Nehemias, Christ, and his martyrs. (Calmet)
The Church, or any just man in the midst of enemies, confidently hopes for victory. (Worthington)
None shall prevail against Christ and his Church. (Berthier)
